T-GREEN-BASE.headline: You're in a good place today.
what_we_see: Energy and stress indicators are within healthy range.
Baseline is stable based on available data.
T-GREEN-BASE.what_it_might_mean: This may be a good window for focused work or physical training.
today_plan: Include strength training or high-intensity movement.

T-AMBER-BASE.headline: Take it steady today.
what_we_see: Some signals suggest moderate strain or lower energy.
Trends indicate a mixed readiness picture.
T-AMBER-BASE.what_it_might_mean: This could be a day to prioritise lighter cognitive work and movement over intensity.
today_plan: Avoid overcommitting on tasks or social obligations.

T-RED-BASE.headline: Recovery is the priority today.
what_we_see: Signals indicate low energy or elevated stress.
Your system may need time to restore.
T-RED-BASE.what_it_might_mean: This may not be the day for high demands. Gentle activity and rest could support recovery.
today_plan: Try 5 minutes of breathing or stillness.
Limit screen time and stimulation where possible.

T-DATA-MISSING.headline: Limited data today.
what_we_see: We don't have enough signal to give a full picture.
A check-in or wearable data would help.
T-DATA-MISSING.what_it_might_mean: Without enough data, we default to a cautious, balanced approach.
